title: song
description: This class represents a song that is part of a Set.

name.description: The name of the song. E.g. Yesterday or "Wish You Were Here"

with.description: A different Artist than the performing one that joined the stage for this song.

cover.description: The original Artist of this song, if different to the performing artist.

info.description: Special incidents or additional information about the way the song was performed at this specific concert. See the setlist.fm guidelines for a complete list of allowed content.

tape.description: The song came from tape rather than being performed live. See the tape section of the guidelines for valid usage.
